display.name: Comet Field
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A field of comets streaking through deep space, bright nuclei pulled into elongated tails by velocity and trail decay.

annotation.technical_notes: A complex per-pixel warp shader distorts the feedback buffer into a dense, self-replicating texture resembling metallic scales or liquid metal threads. Extremely low decay in sampler_main allows these structures to persist and accumulate into a rich, organic landscape. The audio's bass frequencies drive dramatic vertical surges and zoom modulations, causing the entire textured field to ripple dynamically.
